name: Felix Cat Junior Chicken Pouch 85g
description: Nutrition & Analytical Constituents Moisture: 80.0% Crude Protein: 14.0% Crude Oil: 2.5% Crude Ash: 2.2% Crude Fibre: 0.8% Nutritional Additives (per kg) Vitamin A: 1,015 IU Vitamin D3: 140 IU Vitamin E: 150 IU Iron (Fe): 29.5 mg Iodine (I): 0.57 mg Copper (Cu): 3.6 mg Manganese (Mn): 5.2 mg Zinc (Zn): 71.9 mg Selenium (Se): 0.047 mg Feeding Guide For an average adult cat (4 kg), feed 3–4 pouches per day split into at least 2 meals. Adjust feeding amounts based on your cat’s activity level and body condition. Serve at room temperature and always provide fresh drinking water. Key Benefits • Mouth-watering tastes and textures cats love. • Packed with essential vitamins and minerals for daily health. • 100% complete and balanced nutrition. • Delicious chicken flavour for a meaty, satisfying meal
